definition: Order blocks created by extreme displacement candles — the displacement is so strong that the OB becomes a 'propulsion zone' with exceptionally high institutional interest. Propulsion blocks are the STRONGEST type of OB and represent maximum institutional commitment to a direction.
depends_on: order_blocks (propulsion blocks ARE OBs with extreme displacement)
displacement (propulsion requires extreme, not just normal displacement)
fair_value_gaps (propulsion always creates a large FVG alongside the OB)
feeds_into: entry_models (propulsion blocks are the highest-confidence OB entries — top of PD array hierarchy)
PD_arrays (propulsion = strongest array in the stack)
related_to: unicorn_model (propulsion block that becomes a breaker + FVG = enhanced unicorn)

identification_criteria.displacement_size: Candle body must be > 2x the 14-period ATR
identification_criteria.body_ratio: Candle body must be > 80% of the total range (minimal wicks)
identification_criteria.volume: Volume on the displacement candle should be > 1.5x average (if available)
identification_criteria.fvg_creation: The displacement MUST create a visible FVG — no FVG = not a propulsion block
identification_criteria.structural_context: Propulsion should occur during CHoCH or BOS event, not random volatility

vs_regular_ob.regular_ob: Normal displacement (1-2x ATR). FVG may or may not be present. ~65% first-touch reaction.
vs_regular_ob.propulsion_block: Extreme displacement (2x+ ATR). FVG always present. ~85-90% first-touch reaction.
vs_regular_ob.key_difference: Propulsion blocks represent MAXIMUM institutional aggression — the algo is sending a clear signal

trading_rules.entry: ALWAYS use limit order at propulsion block zone (preferably CE within the OB)
trading_rules.sl: Beyond the propulsion block extreme (the wick of the displacement candle)
trading_rules.tp: Draw on liquidity target — propulsion blocks often mark the START of a major move
trading_rules.confidence: If propulsion block forms during kill zone with HTF alignment = Grade A automatically
trading_rules.failure_signal: If price breaks through a propulsion block without reacting = the trend thesis is INVALIDATED. Close all positions in that direction.

trend_initiation.context: Propulsion at the start of a new trend (after liquidity sweep + CHoCH)
trend_initiation.significance: Highest quality — marks the birth of a new institutional move
trend_initiation.hold_time: Valid for days/weeks as price builds away from it

trend_continuation.context: Propulsion in the middle of an existing trend (after pullback + BOS)
trend_continuation.significance: Strong continuation signal — the trend is accelerating

exhaustion_warning.context: Propulsion at an obvious target level (PDH/PDL, PWH/PWL)
exhaustion_warning.significance: WARNING — this may be the final push. Don't chase it.
exhaustion_warning.action: Use as TP zone, not entry zone

scoring.propulsion_at_entry: +10 to ICT score (highest possible OB score)
scoring.propulsion_violation: -15 to ICT score (thesis invalidated — close positions)

bridge_integration.detection: Flag OBs where the displacement candle body > 2x ATR(14) and body_ratio > 0.8
bridge_integration.priority: Propulsion blocks get highest priority in PD array stacking
bridge_integration.invalidation: If price closes beyond propulsion block, trigger immediate re-evaluation of all positions in that direction
